	 Name Notes 
	‘Lord Qimu’ is referenced in SGZ: Wei 8 with a similar background to Qimu Kai. It is likely that ‘Lord Qimu’ and Qimu Kai are the same person.

full_text:
Qimu Kai 綦母闓
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Qimu Kai (綦母闓)was born in Langye?. Scholar in Liu Biao’s court. Produced the “Later Edition” with Song Zhong. Qimu Kai was affiliated with Liu Biao.
